zh.Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托
zh.Rahugh, County Westmeath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯拉修
zh.County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Cusack於大約1299年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯時，他的父親Sir John Cusack29歲，母親Margaret FitzGerald31歲。他於大約1334年與Miss Bath在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯拉修結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托
zh-hans.Rahugh, County Westmeath, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯拉修
zh-hans.County Meath, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Cusack于大约1299年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯时，他的父亲Sir John Cusack29岁，母亲Margaret FitzGerald31岁。他于大约1334年与Miss Bath在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯拉修结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Cusack was born about 1299, in County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir John Cusack, was 29 and his mother, Margaret FitzGerald, was 31. He married Miss Bath about 1334, in Rahugh, County Westmeath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Cusack est né environ 1299, à County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir John Cusack, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzGerald, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Miss Bath environ 1334, à Rahugh, County Westmeath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Cusack um 1299 in County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cusack 29 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzGerald 31. Er hat um 1334 in Rahugh, County Westmeath, Irland Miss Bath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Cusack è nato il circa 1299 nel County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir John Cusack, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzGerald, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Miss Bath circa 1334, nel Rahugh, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウン
ja.Rahugh, County Westmeath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスラヒュー
ja.County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアス
ja.lifeSummary: Simon Cusackが約1299年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで生まれた時，父Sir John Cusackは29歳，母Margaret FitzGeraldは31歳であった。約1334年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスラヒューでMiss Bathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Cusack(이)가 대략 1299년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cusack(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzGerald(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1334년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 라휴에서 Miss Bath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Cusack nasceu aproximadamente 1299, em County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir John Cusack, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzGerald, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss Bath aproximadamente 1334, em Rahugh, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Cusack родился около 1299 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cusack было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzGerald, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss Bath около 1334 г. в местности рахьг, коунти вестмит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Cusack nació aproximadamente 1299, en County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir John Cusack, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzGerald, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Miss Bath aproximadamente 1334, en Rahugh, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
